hotpath-lock-quickwins.title: Eliminate per-command global locks & syscall-level quick wins

spsc-wake-floor.title: Remove the ~1ms monoio cross-shard reply floor (eventfd wake + drain-until-empty)

consistency-dispatch-gaps.title: Close the consistency-suite gaps: unreachable read commands + script defects

shardslice-migration.title: Wire ShardSlice: thread-local shared-nothing storage becomes the live path

xshard-read-fastpath.title: Recover cross-shard read latency lock-free: adaptive spin-then-park + coalescing + dead-flag cleanup

wal-group-commit.title: WAL group commit: batch concurrent pending writes into one fsync under appendfsync=always

ft-search-off-eventloop.title: FT.SEARCH off-event-loop: a heavy vector/text query must not stall the shard's 1ms tick or co-located commands

ft-yield-costfree-monoio.title: Swap monoio cooperative_yield timer-park -> cost-free io_uring CQ-reap; re-tune chunk; A/B re-validate

fts-posting-rank-tf.title: Rank-based posting TF lookup (kill the high-DF O(M^2) cliff)

fts-query-combinators.title: OR unions + TEXT+TAG intersects — correct combinator result sets

fts-query-eval-dispatch.title: Evaluate the query AST to matched sets + wire FT.SEARCH dispatch (2b)

fts-upsert-incremental.title: Incremental posting-list upsert (kill O(V) per-doc scan)

v1-shared-nothing.title: Shared-Nothing Integrity & Cross-Shard Latency
v1-shared-nothing.goal: a 4-shard Moon serves cross-shard traffic without per-command global locks and without the 1ms monoio reply floor, with measured multi-shard scaling improvement over the v0.3.0 baseline

v2-performance.title: Multi-Core Throughput Hardening (v1-deferred perf wins)
v2-performance.goal: a 4-shard Moon measurably improves the three throughput bottlenecks v1 deferred — cross-shard read latency, FT.SEARCH event-loop stalls, and appendfsync=always write collapse — without re-introducing cross-thread locks or growing per-key memory

v2-1-throughput-polish.title: Throughput Polish (recover v2-deferred costs)
v2-1-throughput-polish.goal: On monoio, FT.SEARCH's off-event-loop yield reaps the io_uring CQ without timer-wheel latency, so the brute-force chunk shrinks back to its latency-optimal size and reclaims the ~22% throughput #179 deferred, with #179's co-located latency relief preserved.

v3-1-fts-hardening.title: FTS Hardening
v3-1-fts-hardening.goal: Moon's full-text search is trustworthy and competitive: every query combinator (term, AND, OR, TEXT+TAG, NUMERIC) returns correct results with true total-matched counts, and indexing plus high-DF queries run without the O(V)/O(M^2) cliffs the 2026-06-16 benchmark exposed.

v3-2-graph-correctness.title: Graph Correctness & Cypher Filtering
v3-2-graph-correctness.goal: Moon's graph queries are correct: Cypher MATCH narrows on inline node-property predicates instead of full-scanning the label, directional traversal covers incoming/Both edges post-compaction, and node labels >= 32 are no longer silently dropped.

v3-3-vector-kv-polish.title: Vector & KV Latent-Correctness + Hot-Path Polish
v3-3-vector-kv-polish.goal: Moon's vector segments decode at the correct code length (SQ8 included) and FT.INFO reports true cross-segment doc counts, and the KV/vector command hot paths honor the no-alloc and parking_lot lock-discipline rules.
